name: Transfer Data to Cloud Account
description: Detects bulk data uploads to cloud storage services for exfiltration
query:
// Detect bulk uploads to cloud storage
// Trigger on large uploads to cloud storage domains
events from proxy
where domain matches "(?i)(s3\.amazonaws\.com|blob\.core\.windows\.net|storage\.googleapis\.com|drive\.google\.com|dropbox\.com|onedrive\.live\.com)"
  and method = "PUT"
  and bytes > 10000000
group by source_ip
having count(*) > 3
within 600 seconds
